title: LIFE CHANGE PROGRAM - 211info
text: EUGENE MISSION LIFE CHANGE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an 18 month long faith-based recovery program. Residents are provided with case management, mental health supports, vocational support, recovery supports, and life skills classes. Residents must remain clean and sober for the duration of the program and will be subject to urinalysis testing. 1542 W 1st Avenue Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (544) 344-3251 129 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Information (544) 344-3251 ext 129 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the dead-end of 1st Avenue, west of Blair Boulevard Services: Recovery Homes/Halfway Houses Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - RESCUE SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE MISSION
